name: io.github.inhuman/mcp-ssh-fleet
title: SSH Fleet
description: Curated ssh_probe diagnostics and single-host ssh_exec over an allowlisted SSH fleet.

runtimeArguments.name: -v
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the host inventory allowlist (YAML), read-only.

inventory_path.description: Absolute path to your inventory.yaml on the host (see deploy/inventory.example.yaml).

runtimeArguments.name: -v
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the private SSH key, read-only.

key_path.description: Absolute path to the private SSH key on the host.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_FLEET_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: MCP transport. Must be 'stdio' for direct docker/stdio use.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_FLEET_OUTPUT_CAP_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Cap on output bytes per host section (>=256).

environmentVariables.name: SSH_FLEET_PROBE_MAX_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Safety cap on the number of hosts in one probe.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_FLEET_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional X-MCP-AUTH bearer token (only used by the http/sse transports).
